# MetaKeys.IsValidMetaKeyPrefix method

Returns `true` if *prefix* is a syntactically valid `_meta` key prefix: one or more dot-separated labels terminated by a single `/`. (R-2.6.2-b, R-2.6.2-c, R-2.6.2-d, AC-02.17)

```csharp
public static bool IsValidMetaKeyPrefix(string prefix)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| prefix | The candidate prefix, including its trailing slash. |

## Return Value

`true` when the prefix is well-formed.
